overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district. The player moves through plazas and streets lined with towering glass buildings, neon advertisements, and palm trees, transitioning from dry red pavement to wet reflective surfaces near an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with red pavement and palm tree planters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza on red pavement, passing pedestrians and approaching palm tree planters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking across the plaza path
pedestrian in green jacket walking away from camera

entered.detail: rectangular concrete planters containing tall palm trees lining the central walkway
distinctive red-colored pavement tiles covering the open plaza ground
tall dark glass skyscraper with multiple digital billboards on its facade
modern building with wide concrete stairs and illuminated entrance signage
large glowing advertisement screens mounted on the left building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza with distinctive red pavement. The player walks forward past scattered pedestrians toward a series of palm tree planters, with a massive glass office tower rising on the left covered in digital billboards, and a modern commercial building with stairs on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: avenue leading toward concrete overpass with narrowing sightlines

events.description: moving into shadow cast by tall surrounding buildings and approaching overpass
slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the avenue

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue toward the overpass structure, navigating around barricades

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure spanning the width of the avenue ahead
black and yellow striped construction barriers blocking part of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the open plaza into a narrower avenue, passing the last of the palm tree planters on the left. The environment darkens as the camera enters the shadow of surrounding towers and approaches a massive concrete overpass ahead, navigating around yellow construction barricades in the center of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with heavy neon advertising and overhead walkways

events.description: turning right onto a street lined with massive digital billboards and neon signage
crossing the street as vehicles pass by on the right

agents.ego_description: turning right onto the commercial street and crossing the road while avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the street approaching the crosswalk
pedestrian standing at the corner waiting to cross

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard with red background displaying a character in futuristic armor
enclosed glass walkway connecting buildings high above the street
bright pink neon sign reading SOUTH DESIRE with pricing information
green and red automated kiosk with glowing interface on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a dense commercial canyon filled with towering digital advertisements. A massive red billboard dominates the right side while neon signs glow overhead. The camera crosses the asphalt street, passing a vending machine and navigating around a white car, with an overhead pedestrian bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with wet reflective pavement and tree landscaping

events.description: ascending wide concrete stairs to reach the upper plaza level
ground surface changes to wet reflective pavement showing mirror-like reflections

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs to the upper plaza and walking across the wet reflective surface

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to the elevated plaza
reflective wet tile surface showing mirror reflections of surrounding buildings
mature deciduous trees with green foliage planted in the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wide concrete staircase to an elevated plaza, passing a pedestrian coming down. The scene opens onto a wet reflective pavement that mirrors the surrounding architecture, with mature trees lining the right side. The large red billboard is now visible in the distance on the left as the camera moves through this partially covered urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic urban district, transitioning from a bright, open plaza into a shadowed commercial canyon and finally onto a reflective elevated walkway. It begins on a wide expanse of red pavement, moving past palm tree planters and a glass office tower adorned with digital billboards. As the camera leaves the open plaza, the environment darkens under the shadow of towering buildings and a massive concrete overpass, navigating around yellow construction barricades. The scene then shifts into a dense commercial canyon filled with glowing neon signs and a dominant red billboard before the camera crosses an asphalt street past a white car. Finally, the movement ascends a wide concrete staircase to an elevated plaza, where the dry ground gives way to wet, reflective pavement that mirrors the surrounding architecture and distant advertisements.
